name: Research claims suite template
description: Starter release-gate suite for preliminary findings and overclaim drift.

cases.name: Safe scoped research wording emits
references: The trial observed improved recall in 64% of reviewed cases.
The finding is preliminary and requires replication before broad claims.

The finding is preliminary and requires replication before broad claims.
